The Campaign Co.

The Campaign Co. is a boutique creative agency built for brands that move culture. We blend strategy, design, and storytelling to craft campaigns that not only connect, but convert, scale, and position brands at the forefront of their market.

From concept to campaign, we translate vision into visuals, ideas into influence, and presence into measurable growth. Whether launching a new brand, revitalizing an existing one, or amplifying a moment that matters — every campaign is built with intention, clarity, and cultural relevance.

"We bring creative direction and business intelligence into full alignment — because great work should be beautiful and it should perform." Adeja AllenFounder · Strategist · Former Celebrity Agent

Founded by Adeja Allen — a strategist, former celebrity agent, and creative director with over a decade of experience across entertainment, music, lifestyle, wellness, and luxury brands — The Campaign Co. was built on a simple belief: vision deserves a strategy that can match it.

Having worked across industries and sat at the intersection of culture, commerce, and creativity, Adeja brings a perspective most agencies simply can't offer. That cross-industry fluency is the agency's edge — the ability to pull from entertainment, sports, wellness, and luxury all at once, and apply it to your brand in a way that feels fresh, intentional, and culturally informed.

The Campaign Co. was established to be more than a marketing vendor. It's a creative partnership — built for founders, artists, and brands ready to move from vision to momentum through strategic thinking, brand partnerships, and campaigns that leave a mark.

Global Reach

The Campaign Co. is not a local agency with global ambitions — it is a globally active agency that happens to be based in Los Angeles. The work has crossed oceans, time zones, and cultural boundaries, with campaigns executed across 7+ countries on 3 continents.

From Mexico and the Americas to Africa, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific, The Campaign Co. understands what it takes to build brand relevance in markets where cultural nuance is everything and generic messaging simply doesn't land.

7+Countries Served
3Continents
1Point of View

What We Do

Three
Pillars.
One Vision.

Three distinct areas of expertise. Each one built from real experience, real results, and a deep understanding of what it takes to move culture.

01

Multicultural
Marketing

We craft campaigns that connect across languages and cultures with authenticity. From Latin American and African markets to global audiences, we ensure every message resonates and feels culturally fluent.

02

Music &
Entertainment

Built from real industry experience. We execute campaigns across digital platforms, live events, and cultural moments — from DSP strategy and release rollouts to booking, touring, and brand partnerships.

03

Creative
Direction

We define the direction behind every campaign — from positioning and audience targeting to messaging and rollout. Every decision is built to increase visibility, strengthen brand perception, and drive measurable growth.

Case Studies

Vision to Impact.

Real results from brands that move culture.

01

High Hemp Co.

Brand Development · Marketing · Partnership Strategy

Scaled an emerging wellness brand into a nationally recognized lifestyle movement through brand identity, campaign strategy, experiential events, and major festival partnerships.

Increased brand awareness by 400% within the first year
Expanded nationwide distribution and retail visibility
Produced recurring experiential events and live showcases
Supported growth into major festival partnerships, including Rolling Loud
Result
+400%
Brand Awareness
in Year One
02

Sacramento Kings

Strategic Booking · Audience Engagement Campaign

Transformed halftime shows into a multi-demographic entertainment experience that strengthened community engagement and brand loyalty — independent of team record.

+200% social and web traffic during activation
30% growth in multi-generational attendance within three months
Curated legacy and emerging acts to bridge audiences and revive nostalgia
Performances drove measurable boosts in artist streams and search traffic
Result
+200%
Social & Web
Traffic
03

TIME Nightclub

Brand Development · Urban Market Expansion

Repositioned TIME as a cultural hub in the Orange County market through Hip-Hop-driven programming, high-profile bookings, and targeted influencer partnerships.

Record-breaking attendance and consistent sold-out events
Secured performances from Chris Brown, Rick Ross, 50 Cent, and more
Elevated revenue and visibility through targeted influencer and event partnerships
Result
Record-Breaking
Attendance &
Sold-Out Events
Done-For-You Marketing

Full-Service Marketing,
Fully Managed.

Everything your brand needs to grow — strategized, created, and executed by our team so you can focus on building.

01

Strategy & Positioning

We define your audience, messaging, and rollout plan to maximize visibility and results.

02

Creative & Content Direction

We create visuals, copy, and assets that are cohesive, elevated, and aligned with your brand.

03

Digital & Platform Management

We manage campaigns across social media, DSPs, email, and web to engage your audience and amplify reach.

04

Partnerships & Activations

We coordinate influencers, events, and brand collaborations to expand your presence and influence.

05

Analytics & Optimization

We measure results, refine campaigns, and scale performance for maximum growth.
